ksa_text: Manage and maintain databases and analytical infrastructure, including monitoring database performance, maintaining DBMS software, optimizing queries, and providing ongoing operational support.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of database maintenance principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.417) to justify inclusion for the VP Analytics. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Analytics roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Applied Analytics & BI is not a standard competency expectation for VP Analytics. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Analytics competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.417) and edge-domain placement (Applied Analytics & BI) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Analytics. All passes support exclusion.
